messages.author: bob_martinez
messages.text: Checking. Looks like All endpoint p99 latencies jumped to exactly 30 000 ms. Investigating.

messages.author: carol_kim
messages.text: I see it too. Could be related to recent deploy.

messages.author: bob_martinez
messages.text: Found the issue: The NGINX config change placed proxy_read_timeout 30s in the http {} block inste.... Deploying fix.

messages.author: bob_martinez
messages.text: Confirmed resolved. Writing up incident report.
